patch_title: Patch 7.38 Notes | FINAL FANTASY XIV, The Lodestone

new_content.name: AAC Cruiserweight Tier (Savage)
new_content.description: The weekly restriction on receiving Cruiser Holosabers from AAC Cruiserweight M4 has been removed. Treasure coffers will now always appear, with no reduction of rewards, regardless of whether any party members have previously cleared the area. The weekly restriction on rewards obtained from treasure coffers has been removed. The weekly entrance restriction has been removed. Players may now proceed directly to any area.

new_content.name: Allagan Tomestones of Mathematics Weapon Enhancement
new_content.description: The item required to enhance weapons purchased with Allagan tomestones of mathematics, Evercharged Ester, can be purchased from Uah'shepya using Ordelle Coin and Montiont Coin. After acquiring the items, speak with Theone to exchange them for gear.
new_content.npc_location: Uah'shepya at Solution Nine (X:8.7, Y:13.5), Theone at Solution Nine (X:8.5, Y:13.6)

new_content.name: Ivalice Alliance Raids Rewards
new_content.description: A reward has been added to the shared treasure coffers that appear upon completion of the Royal City of Rabanastre, the Ridorana Lighthouse, and the Orbonne Monastery.

housing.name: Legends of Ivalice Wall-mounted
housing.description: A masterfully rendered oil depiction of legendary Ivalician figures from a tumultuous age.
